answers: Solo travel: liberating and empowering. Plan safety, tell someone your itinerary, trust your instincts.
Planning for solo travel in advance ensures a better experience.
Solo Travel can be an amazing experience. Research and prepare before you go.
Tips for solo travel: plan ahead, budget wisely, be flexible, and enjoy the journey!
